header.title: Live Tutoring
header.subtitle: Live video — direct and private, no servers.

actions.startDesc: Start a live video session with camera and mic. Share the invite so others can join.
actions.joinDesc: Enter an invite to join a session someone else started. Your camera and mic turn on when you join.

lobby.rejoinHint: Session in progress — tap to rejoin
lobby.emptyDesc: Start or join a live video session. Everything streams directly between you — no servers.

create.title: Start a Tutoring Session
create.subtitle: Give your session a name. Others join using the invite you share.

join.title: Join a Tutoring Session
join.subtitle: Paste the invite shared with you.

device.title: Device Check
device.speaker: Speaker
device.noCameras: No cameras found — this session will be audio-only
device.textOnly: You can still join — this session will use text chat only.

qr.scanSubtitle: Point your camera at the QR code shown on the other device.

scanner.denied: Camera access was denied. Turn on camera access in your system settings and try again.
scanner.unsupported: The camera isn't available on this device.
scanner.errorNoCameraApi: The camera isn't available on this device.

session.shareHint: Share the invite using the button above.
session.screenShareDesc: Your screen is being shared with others
session.enableCameraHint: Tap the camera button to turn it on
session.notFoundDesc: This session may have ended, or you haven't joined it.

chat.title: Session Chat
chat.p2pHint: Messages are sent directly and privately

audio.title: Sound Devices
audio.subtitle: Live tutoring plays through the speaker by default, or switches to a connected headset or Bluetooth device when you pick one here.
audio.iosHint: On iPhone, connected headset and Bluetooth options appear here once iOS makes them available to the call.

leave.title: Leave Session?
leave.desc: Your camera and microphone will stop. Other people will see you leave.

ticketFallback.title: Invite
ticketFallback.desc: Select and copy the invite below to share with others.

qrInvite.title: Scan to join
qrInvite.desc: Open Alexandria on another device and scan this code from the Join screen.

diagnostics.title: Connection details
diagnostics.selectManual: Select all the text above and copy it manually
